query:
SELECT 
  id,
  user_id,
  action,
  table_name,
  record_id,
  old_values,
  new_values,
  created_at
FROM audit_log
WHERE table_name = 'attendance_events'
  AND DATE(created_at) >= '2026-02-07'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
